name: Pond Twister
short_description: The cutest dragonflies need your help! Navigate twisting ponds full of ambushes in this swirling SmartGames adventure!
detailed_description:
Frogs, geckos, fishes, and carnivorous plants are patiently waiting for their dragonfly snack. Twist your way across the pond to avoid the insectivores and make a safe dragonfly passage. Choose a tile to activate and spin its surrounding tiles, shifting their positions to guide the dragonfly to safety on the purple tile.

Pond Twister is a puzzle game from SmartGames, featuring 60 challenges across 5 lily pond worlds, guaranteed to twist your spatial insight skills!

Will you become the World’s Smartest Gamer?
